name: Draw my Path Obby
author: Poki
description: Get ready for some lightning fast sketches in Draw My Path Obby - an exciting multiplayer parkour game that tests your quick reflexes and insane IQ. If you're quick enough you can dominate the lobbies by outsmarting and outdrawing your oponents. Are you ready for some drawing and dashing? Then grab your pen and let's go! How do I play Draw my Path Obby? Move: A & D, or Left & Right Arrow Jump: W, Up Arrow, or Spacebar Pause: Escape Pen: Q Eraser: E Remove All Drawings: R Use your mouse to draw your path! Who created Draw my Path Obby? Draw my Path Obby is created by Emolingo Games. Play their other games on Poki: Car Machines , Disaster Arena , Escape From School , Rainbow Obby , and Sword Masters ! How can I play Draw my Path Obby for free? You can play Draw my Path Obby for free on Poki. Can I play Draw my Path Obby on mobile devices and desktop? Draw my Path Obby can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Draw my Path Obby with my friend? Yes! Draw my Path Obby is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
